scripts.run:all: node scripts/restoreHistory.js && cucumber-js && node scripts/saveHistory.js && node scripts/generateReport.js
scripts.run:name: node scripts/restoreHistory.js && cucumber-js --name "%npm_config_name%" && node scripts/saveHistory.js && node scripts/generateReport.js
scripts.run:tag: node scripts/restoreHistory.js && cucumber-js --tags "$npm_config_tag" && node scripts/saveHistory.js && node scripts/generateReport.js
scripts.run:login: node scripts/restoreHistory.js && cucumber-js --tags @login-sucesso && node scripts/saveHistory.js && node scripts/generateReport.js
